description: Schema for the node_compat config.jsonc file that controls which Node.js compatibility tests are enabled and their expected behavior.
title: Node compat test config schema

tests.description: Map of test file paths to their configuration. Keys are relative paths like 'parallel/test-foo.js'.

expectedFailure.description: Describes an expected test failure with optional exit code and/or output pattern.

exitCode.description: Expected exit code when the test fails.

output.description: Expected output pattern. Supports [WILDCARD] for matching any text.

platformExpectation.description: Per-platform expectation: true = run normally (expect pass), false = skip, or an object describing an expected failure.

oneOf.description: true = enabled (expect pass), false = disabled (skip on this platform)

flaky.description: If true, the test is considered flaky and may be retried in CI.

ignore.description: If true, the test is skipped on all platforms. Must be used together with 'reason'.

reason.description: Explanation for why the test is disabled or has special configuration.

exitCode.description: Expected exit code for all platforms (overridden by per-platform config).

output.description: Expected output pattern for all platforms. Supports [WILDCARD] matching.

env.description: Per-test environment variables, layered on top of the runner's defaults. Use sparingly — only for tests where one Node fixture needs a config the rest of the suite must not have.
